description: A debate featuring Raoul Pal and FrankDeGods discussing the future of AI in cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. They explore the current landscape of AI coins, the integration of AI with blockchain, and the rapid advancements in technology.
topic_summary: Raoul Pal and FrankDeGods engage in a discussion about AI coins and their implications in the crypto space, emphasizing the collaboration between AI and blockchain technologies [t=31:18].
